title: 2026 Oscars Best Adapted Screenplay Predictions
text: Based on PrizePicks Culture Picks user predictions, One Battle After Another is the overwhelming favorite, with a payout of 1.02x on a $100 entry. The film, loosely adapted from Thomas Pynchon's 1990 novel Vineland, has significantly separated itself from competitors. Hamnet is the distant second choice, offering 16.66x returns, indicating much longer odds. The remaining nominees—including Train Dreams, Frankenstein, and Bugonia—are grouped together at 33.33x payouts, suggesting minimal public confidence in their chances. The massive gap between the frontrunner and others reflects strong market conviction that One Battle After Another will claim this Oscar category.
